_meta.method: Same 3-factor consensus as refresh_fo_cloud.py (EMA alignment, MACD, pivot breakout, ROC5). votes==6 -> single-leg, votes in [4,5] -> capped-risk spread.

ICICIBANK.name: ICICIBANK
ICICIBANK.data_warning: Signals based on 2026-07-24 close (yfinance EOD, delayed/unofficial). Verify in Kite before trading.
ICICIBANK.commentary: WAIT (CE 2/6, PE 3/6 -- neither side reached the 4-vote threshold): price 1422.7 is above EMA18 (1412.72) and EMA50 (1364.73) -- established uptrend (+2 CE) | MACD (27.93) is below its signal line (28.62) -- bearish momentum (+1 PE) | price broke below pivot support S1 (1430.6) -- breakdown confirmed (+2 PE) | 5-day momentum (ROC5 0.32%) is muted -- no edge from this factor ⚠ All 4 factors above are derived from the same single price series -- not independent confirmations. INFY.name: INFY
INFY.data_warning: ℹ 6/6 still gets the same capped-risk spread as every other vote level, not extra exposure — this system's own 3-year backtest found the old "6-vote = single-leg" rule was actually its worst-performing bucket (39.7% win, Sharpe 2.71 vs 41.9-45.3% win, Sharpe 3.0-4.8 for spreads).
